description: Semantic layer for hospitals, clinics, health systems, and care facilities. Covers patient flow, clinical operations, staffing, and financial performance.

entities.name: Patient
entities.operational_meaning: Core entity for patient flow, census, safety, and outcomes tracking

entities.name: Encounter
entities.description: A single interaction between a patient and healthcare provider
entities.operational_meaning: Drives LOS, readmission, throughput, and cost metrics

entities.name: Provider
entities.operational_meaning: Tracks workload, productivity, compliance, and patient outcomes by clinician

entities.name: Bed
entities.description: Physical inpatient bed or care location
entities.operational_meaning: Central to occupancy management and capacity planning

entities.name: Ward
entities.description: Clinical area or nursing unit where patients are cared for
entities.operational_meaning: Used for capacity planning, staffing ratios, and performance benchmarking

entities.name: Appointment
entities.operational_meaning: Used for access metrics, no-show rates, and waiting time analysis

entities.name: Medication
entities.description: Pharmaceutical product prescribed or administered to a patient
entities.operational_meaning: Drives adherence, formulary compliance, and drug spend analysis

vocabulary.definition: Number of days between admission and discharge for an inpatient encounter
vocabulary.sql_hint: DATE_PART('day', discharge_date - admission_date) or DATEDIFF(discharge_date, admission_date)

vocabulary.definition: Mean number of inpatient days across a group of encounters
Patient admitted again within 30 days of a prior discharge
vocabulary.sql_hint: encounter where admission_date <= prior_discharge_date + INTERVAL '30 days' AND encounter_type = 'INPATIENT'

vocabulary.definition: Patient clinically ready to leave but still occupying a bed
vocabulary.sql_hint: status IN ('DISCHARGE_PENDING','AWAITING_DISCHARGE','READY_FOR_DISCHARGE') OR discharge_date IS NULL AND ready_for_discharge = TRUE

vocabulary.definition: Percentage of available beds that are occupied at a point in time
Patient returning to the emergency department within 72 hours
vocabulary.sql_hint: visit_type = 'EMERGENCY' AND visit_date <= prior_ed_visit_date + INTERVAL '72 hours'

vocabulary.definition: Patient who left the ED before receiving treatment

suggested_questions: What is the average length of stay by ward this month?
Which wards have the highest number of discharge-pending patients right now?
Show me 30-day readmission rates by specialty for the last quarter
What is today's bed occupancy by ward?
Which providers have the highest patient volume this week?
Show me ED wait times by hour for the last 7 days
How many appointments were missed or cancelled last month?
What is the trend in emergency admissions over the past 6 months?

alert_templates.name: High Bed Occupancy
alert_templates.description: Ward bed occupancy exceeds the high-risk threshold
alert_templates.metric_hint: COUNT(*) FROM beds WHERE status = 'OCCUPIED' grouped by ward

alert_templates.name: Discharge Backlog Alert
alert_templates.description: Patients waiting for discharge have exceeded the target
alert_templates.metric_hint: COUNT(*) FROM encounters WHERE status IN ('DISCHARGE_PENDING','AWAITING_DISCHARGE')

alert_templates.name: High ED Wait Time
alert_templates.description: Average ED wait time has exceeded 2 hours
alert_templates.metric_hint: AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (triage_time - arrival_time))/60) FROM ed_visits WHERE arrival_date = CURRENT_DATE
